	<!-- Project scaffolded with Vite React TS, dependencies installed with legacy peer deps, Tailwind configured manually. -->

- [x] Customize the Project
	<!-- Project customized: App updated for mode selection, revelation game refactored into component with imported data and utils, memory game placeholder created. -->

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	<!-- No extensions needed for Vite React project. -->

- [x] Compile the Project
	<!-- Project builds successfully without errors. -->

- [ ] Create and Run Task
	<!-- Dev server is running; no additional tasks needed. -->

- [x] Launch the Project
	<!-- Dev server launched on http://localhost:5173/. -->

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	<!-- README.md exists and is up to date. -->

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
